titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien d'Abbadie 13
Missal

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

notatedMusic.desc: Musical notation in the biggest part of the text.

msItem.title: Covenant of the Morning
msItem.incipit: ኪዳን፡ ዘነግህ። ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር። ቅዱስ፡ ኃያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እማርያም፡ እምቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ተሣሃለነ፡ እግዚኦ። ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር። ቅዱስ፡ ኃያል። ዘኢይመውት፨ ዘተጠምቀ፡ በዮርዳኖስ፡

msItem.title: Litany for the night
msItem.incipit: ናስተብቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፨ እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡ በኵሉ፡ ወበውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ እስመ፡ ከደነነ፡ ወረድአነ፡ ሶቀነ፡ ወአብጽሐነ፡ እስከ፡ ዛቲ፡ ሰዓት፡

msItem.title: Litany for Wednesday
msItem.incipit: ወካእበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለአምላከ፡ ምሕረት፡ ዘረዳዕኮ፡ ለአብርሃም፡ አመ፡ ይቀትሎሙ፡ ለነገሥት፡ ዘአድኃንኮ፡ ለይስሐቅ፡ እምነ፡ መጥባሕት፡ ዘመራኅኮ፡ ለያዕቆብ፡ ውስተ፡ መንገድ፡

msItem.title: Litany for Monday
msItem.incipit: ወካእበ፡ ናስተብቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ እንዘ፡ ነአኵቶ፡ እስመ፡ ዐቀበነ፡ በኑኀ፡ ሌሊት፡ ወአብጽሐነ፡ እምጽልመት፡ ውስተ፡ ብርሃን፡ እሙስና፡ ውስተ፡ ዘኢይማስን፡

msItem.title: Litany for Tuesday
msItem.incipit: ስምከ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ትጉህ፡ ዘኢይዴቅስ፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ዘኢይደክም፡

msItem.title: Litany for Friday
msItem.incipit: ለትሩጽ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ምሕረትከ፡ ላዕሌነ፡ ወብርሃነ፡ ገጽከ፡ ላዕለ፡ ነፍስነ፡ ይምፃእ፡ ምሕረትከ፡ ዘየሐይወነ፡

msItem.title: Litany for Saturday
msItem.incipit: ከመ፡ ታድኅነነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ እምዕለት፡ እኪት፡ ወእምሰዓታተ፡ መንሱት፨ ወእምኵሎሙ፡ ዘእኩያን፡ ትምይንት፡ እምህየት፡ ወእምጽርዓት፡

msItem.title: Litany for Sunday
msItem.incipit: ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ለለ፩፩ስእለቶ፡ ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ለለ፩፩፡ እምከርሠ፡ እሙ። ተዘከር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ብዙኃነ፡ አሕዛበ፡

msItem.title: Litany for Thursday
msItem.incipit: ቀዳሜ፡ ጸጋ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ኃይሉ፡ ወጥበቡ፡ ለአቡሁ፡ እስመ፡ አንተ፡ ውእቱ፡ በግዑ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘአትት፡ ኃጢአተ፡ ዓለም፡ ተሣሃለነ፨

msItem.title: Supplication for the sick
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ ለዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ ዱያን፡ አሐዊነ፡ ከመ፡ ኵሎ፡ ደዌ፡ ወኵሎ፡ ሕማመ፡ ያሰስል፡ እምኔሆሙ፡ መንፈሰ፡ ደዌ፡ ስዒሮ፡ ሕይወተ፡ የሀቦሙ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the sick
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ዘኩእለ፡ ይነግዱ፡ አኀዊነ፡ ወበእንተሂ፡ እለ፡ ሀለዉ፡ ይንግዱ፡ እመሂ፡ በባሕር፡ ወእመሂ፡ በአፍላግ፡

msItem.title: Mastabqʷǝʿān, በእንተ፡ ዝናማት።
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፨ በእንተ፡ ዝናማት፡ ከመ፡ ዝናሞ፡ ይፈኑ፡ ውስተ፡ ኀበ፡ ይትፈቀድ፡ መካን፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the harvest
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፨ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡ ከመ፡ ፍሬሃ፡ ለምድር፡ ያልኅቅ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for water of the rivers
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ በል፡ በእንተ፡ ማያተ፡ አፍላግ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርግ፡ እስከ፡ መሥፈርቶሙ፤ ያስተፍሥሕ፡ ገጻ፡ ለምድር፡ አብጽሕ፡ ወያረዊ፡ ትለሚሃ፨

msItem.title: Supplication of the king
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ናስተበቍዖ፨ በእንተ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡፨ ንጉሥነ፡ እግሌ፡ ከመ፡ መንግሥቶ፡ ዘዕንበለ፡ ሕማም፡ ወሰላም፨ ወበጽድቅ፡ ይዕቀብ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the Deceased
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፨ አምላክ፡ ዘመናፍስት፡ ወለኵሉ፡ ዘሥጋ፡ እግዚአ፡ አጋዕዝት፡ ወአምላከ፡ በቍዔት፡ ዘሞተ፡ አጽራዕከ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the Deceased
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፨ አምላክ፡ ዘመናፍስት፡ ወለኵሉ፡ ዘሥጋ፡ እግዚአ፡ አጋዕዝት፡ ወአምላከ፡ በቍዔት፡ ዘሞተ፡ አጽራዕከ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for peace
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዖ፡ በል፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡ ለቅድስት፡ አሐቲ፡ እንተ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሉ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ከመ፡ ብዙኃ፡ ሰላም፡ ይጸጉ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ሕዝብ፡

msItem.title: Supplication ʿǝzl za-yǝnaggǝś of ʾabuna Yāred
msItem.incipit: ዕዝል፡ ዘይነግሥ> ወካዕበ፡ ናአኵቶ፡ ወንዜብሖ፡ ለእለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አሐዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዘኪያሁ፡ ይሴብሑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ኃይለ፡ ሰማያት፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the travellers
msItem.incipit: ዕዝል፡ ዘይነግሥ> ወካዕበ፡ ናአኵቶ፡ ወንዜብሖ፡ ለእለእግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አምላክነ፡ አሐዜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ዘይነግሥ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዘኪያሁ፡ ይሴብሑ፡ ኵሉ፡ ኃይለ፡ ሰማያት፡

incipit.hi: እግዚኦሙ፡ ወአምላኮሙ፡ ለማያት፡ ንስእለከ፡ ወናስተበቍዓከ፡ ከመ፡ ትፈኑ፡ ዝናመ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the fruits
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ በእንተ፡ ፍሬ፡ ምድር፡ ከመ፡ ፍሬሃ፡ ለምድር፡ ያልህቅ፡ ወያሥምር፡ ወይዕቀብ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ሙስና፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the traders
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ በእንተ፡ ማያተ፡ አፍላግ፡ ከመ፡ ያዕርግ፡ እስከ፡ መስፈርቶሙ፡ እስመ፡ አንተ፡ ዘትገብር፡ ሠናያተ፨ ወታርኁ፡ ክረምተ፡ ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for kings
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ እግዚኦሙ፡ ለአጋዕዝት፡ ወንጉሦሙ፡ ለነገሥት፡ በእንተ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ገብርከ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ኢያሱ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for peace
msItem.incipit: ወካ፡ በእንተ፡ ሰላም፡ ለቅድስት፡ አሐቲ፡ እንተ፡ በኵለሄ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ከመ፡ ብዙኃ፡ ሰላም፡ ይጸጉ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ኖሎት፡ ወአሕዛብ፡ ውእቱ፡ ወሀቤ፡ ሰላም፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፨

msItem.title: Supplication for the community
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ በእንተ፡ ማኅበርነ፡ ዛቲ፡ ከመ፡ ዛተኒ፨ ወኵሎ፡ ማኅበረ፡ የሀብ፡

msItem.title: Supplication for the living
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ዘኵሉ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፨ እግዚአ፡ ሕያዋን፡ ሕይወተ፡ ሙታን፡ ተስፋ፡ ቅቡፃን፡ ረዳኤ፡ ምንዱባን፡ ወምንጽሔ፡ ኃጥአን፡

msItem.title: Supplication for St Mary
msItem.incipit: ካህን፡ ዘተአምር፡ ወንጌል፡ ይብል፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እግዚኦ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ አምላክነ፡ ዘትቤሎ፡ ለፍቁርከ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ እንዘ፡ ሀሎከ፡ ዲበ፡ ዕፀ፡ መስቀል፡ ቅዱስ፨

msItem.title: Supplication for St Mary
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዓ፡ ለንግሥተ፡ ኵልነ፡ ማርያም፡ እምነ፡ ወእሙ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ንስእል፡ ወነኃሥሥ፡

msItem.title: Common of the Office
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልደ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ቅዳሴ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ዘይደሉ፡ ከመ፡ ይብሉ፡ ቀሲስ፡ ወዲያቆን፡ ወኵሉ፡ ዘመፍትው፡ በበጊዜሁ፡
msItem.explicit: ዘቦቱ፡ ለከ፡ ምስለሁ፡ ወምስለ፡ ቅዱስ፡ መንፈስ፡ ስብሐት፡ ወእኂዝ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፨ አሜን፨ ፨ ፨

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by John, son of Thunder (same as LIT1570habeka)
Anaphora of Mary by St Cyriacus of Behnesa
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Jacob of Serug (same as LIT2404Tanseu)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Basil (same as LIT1098Anapho)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by Athanasius (same as LIT1162Athana)
Maṣḥafa qǝddāse, Anaphora by John Chrysostom (same as LIT3120Anapho)
Anaphora of St Gregory of Nyssa
Anaphora of St Gregory, brother of Basil
Anaphora of St Gregory, brother of Basil

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner of the leaves.

collation.note: On the basis of the accessible images the structure of the quires cannot be discerned.

layout.note: Slightly different number of lines on other folia.
The leaves are pricked and ruled probably only in part.

handNote.desc: Careful, regular; by a good scribe.
Not very careful, irregular; by a mediocre scribe; of inferior quality, more recent than . Big rounded letters.
Not very careful, somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe; of inferior quality, more recent than .

Not very careful, somewhat irregular; by a mediocre scribe; of inferior quality, more recent than other hands. Letters of big size; in many cases the 3rd order (-i) appears to have been used instead of the 5th-order vowel (-e), and in some cases the 5th order (-e) instead of the 1st-order vowel (-a) (see Règles de l’Église (documents éthiopiens)Journal AsiatiqueMarcelGriaule19322211-42https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k93321b/f3.item4).

item.desc: A note concerning purity for receiving the Eucharist
item.q: እምቦ፡ ዘኮነ፡ ንጹሐ፡ ይንሥአ፡ እምነ፡ ቍርባን፡ ወዘኢኮነ፡ ንጹሐ፡ ኢይንሥአ፡ እስመ፡ ኢያአይ፡ በእሳተ፡ መለኮት፡
ተሣሃልከ፡ እግዚአ፡ ምድረከ፡ ሃሌ፡ ሃሌ፡ ሉያ፡ ሃሌ፡ ሃሌ፡ ሉያ፡ ይእቲ፡ ማርያም፡ እምነ፡
ሥርዓተ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ ቂስ፡ ማለት፡ ሰዋዒ፡ ሠራዒ፡ አስተጋባዒ፡ አስተስራኢ፡ ሐማሚ፡ ለኵሉ፡ አበ፡ ብዙኃን፡ ኖላዊ፡ ነው። ካቡ፡ በድን፡ ነው፡ ኃጥአን፡ ናቺው። ገረገራው፡ መላእክት፡ ናቺው። ሣእሩ፡ ምዕመናን፡ ናቺው።
item.note: Published in Règles de l’Église (documents éthiopiens)Journal AsiatiqueMarcelGriaule19322211-42https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k93321b/f3.item3-12

desc.title: The chants ‘The hosts of the angels of the Saviour of the World...’

item.q:
ዘሰኑይ፡ ሠራዊተ፡ መላእክቲሁ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ይቀውሙ፡ ቅድሜሁ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ወይኬልልዎ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ሥጋሁ፡ ወደሙ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ ወንብጻሕ፡ ቅድመ፡ ገጹ፡ ቅድመ፡ ገጹ፡ ከመ፡ ንባዕ፡ ውስ
ተ፡ ጸርሐ፡ ቅድሳቱ፡ ለመድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ በዝየ፡ ተፈጸመ፡ ሠራዊተ፡ መላእክቲሁ፡ ፳፬
ጽሎት፡ ዘሙታን። ወካዕበ፡ ናስተበቍዕ፡ ዘኵሎ፡ ይእኅዝ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አብ፡ ለእግዚእ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በእንተ፡ እለ፡ ኖሙ፡ አኃዊነ፡ ከመ፡ ነፍሶሙ፡ ያዕርፍ፡ ውስተ፡ መካን፡ ሥኡር፡
ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘቅዱስ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ዘወሀቦ፡ ʾAwsābyosአውሳብዮስ። ዘሠረቆ፡ ወዘፈኃቆ፡ ወዘተሣየጦ፡ ወዘአውጽኦ፡ ኀበአፋ፡ በሥልጣነ፡
item.note: Written in the upper margin of the leaf bearing .

item.desc: Shelfmark of the Library on the inner side of the front board
Shelfmark and/or stamp of the Library.
Corrections on some folia, in the main and other hands
Name of a scribe (Kina Śǝllāse), written in mirror writing; possibly he is the scribe of Hand 1

binding.decoNote: According to A. d’Abbadie, the manuscript has the traditional two-part leather case.

history.origin: Between 1730 and 1755. The name of King ʾIyāsu II (most probably ʾIyāsu II) is mentioned in the beginning of Supplication for kings (cp. also ). C. Conti Rossini dated the manuscript to the 17th century, and M. Chaîne to the 19th century.
history.provenance: Names of the original commissioners have been erased from the supplication formulars. Other names have been written over erasures, in a later hand, in particular Takla Hāymānot, ʾAwsābyos (obviously not Bāsǝlyos, as stated by C. Conti Rossini), Takla Giyorgis (e.g. ), Kǝfla Giyorgis (), Zawga Śǝllāse () and many others (). Additional note 5 states that the manuscript was donated by ʾAwsābyos, to a further not identified church dedicated to St George. The manuscript was later aquired by Antoine d’Abbadie, sometime between 1840 and 1848.
history.acquisition: The manuscript entered the Bibliothèque nationale de France in 1902.

bibl.title: Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’Abbadie
Extrait du Journal Asiatique
Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’Abbadie
Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created the record on the basis of the available images.
